mapper.select: SELECT * FROM festival_info f WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FESTIVAL_THEMES m WHERE m.content_id = f.content_id ) AND f.overview IS NOT NULL

SELECT f.content_id, f.title, f.overview, f.region_code, f.modified_time, (SELECT LISTAGG(t.theme_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY t.theme_name) FROM FESTIVAL_THEMES ft JOIN THEME_MASTER t ON ft.theme_code = t.theme_code WHERE ft.content_id = f.content_id) as themes FROM festival_info f WHERE f.overview IS NOT NULL AND (f.INDEXED_MODIFIED_TIME IS NULL OR f.modified_time > f.INDEXED_MODIFIED_TIME)
